mechanics.excerpt: Sweep (Attack): Your target number to hit is increased by but if successful your opponent is knocked prone in addition taking normal damage _ Neck Jab (Attack): character must have at least Skill Bonus in Military t0 use this maneuver: Your target number is increased by the target' s RFL Attribute plus his highest Martial Arts Skill Bonus (if any) but your attack is successtul the target must make an immediate Knockout Test.
